description: Generate automated SQL-based compliance checks, alert rules, and validation logic that continuously monitor training data for policy violations.

question_patterns: SQL checks that flag learners out of compliance

transformations: identify policy thresholds and SLA conditions from metric definitions
generate SQL WHERE clauses for threshold violations
map each test to affected entities (learner, org_unit, program)

cce_config.uses: internal Shapley → test_case.severity_weight — tests on causally central metrics get higher severity

recommender_instructions.metric_selection_bias: prefer metrics with clear thresholds and policy-defined boundaries; deprioritize subjective or advisory metrics
recommender_instructions.output_guidance: each recommended metric should include test_condition (SQL-expressible), threshold_value, severity, and frequency (how often to run the check)
recommender_instructions.causal_usage: optional — use causal centrality to weight test severity: tests on hub metrics get higher severity_weight

penalty_rules: penalize trend-only metrics that cannot be checked at a point in time (-0.10)
boost_rules: boost metrics with explicit policy/SLA thresholds (+0.10)
boost metrics with high causal centrality (central compliance indicators) (+0.05)
